statement: In every magma, Equation 2438 (`x = (y * (z * (w * u))) * w`) implies Equation 3839 (`x * y = (z * w) * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0606
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w u))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op x w))
